title: Dance Department presents Repertory Concert 2026
summary_en: The UW–Madison Dance Department presents its Repertory Concert 2026, featuring work from Omari Carter, Bradford Chin, Aaron Loux, Anna Peretz Rogovoy, Liz Sexe, and Collette Stewart. Performances will take place April 23–25 in the Margaret H’Doubler Performance Space, Lathrop Hall.
title_cn: 舞蹈系举办2026年度保留剧目汇演

title: ELPA higher education faculty member Xueli Wang wins inaugural UW–Madison graduate student mentoring award
summary_en: Xueli Wang was one of just six faculty members campus-wide to be chosen for the The Graduate School’s inaugural Faculty Award for Excellence in Graduate Student Mentoring.
title_cn: ELPA高等教育方向教职人员王雪丽荣获威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校首届研究生指导奖

title: Building research leaders: A new model for empowering undergraduates to strengthen research teams
summary_en: At the Center for Research on Complex Thinking (CRCT) in UW–Madison's School of Education, undergraduates routinely perform at a graduate-student level and help train faculty and researchers from around the world.
title_cn: 培养科研领军人才：赋能本科生强化科研团队的新模式

title: Art in Focus: Q&A with MFA candidate Mark Almanza
summary_en: Mark Almanza is an interdisciplinary artist who works across a variety of mediums to explore their Chicano identity. Their MFA thesis exhibition, “Don’t Everybody Like The Smell Of Gasoline?” will be on view April 21–26 in UW–Madison’s Art Lofts Gallery.
title_cn: 聚焦艺术：艺术硕士候选人马克·阿尔曼萨问答

title: UW–Madison research reveals experiences of HMoob (Hmong) undergraduates across Universities of Wisconsin
summary_en: An updated statistical portrait of HMoob (Hmong) American undergraduates enrolled in the 13 campuses of the Universities of Wisconsin reveals a college experience marked by unique challenges and opportunities.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校研究揭示威斯康星大学系统赫蒙族本科生就读经历
